idea-plugin.name: Magma
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.2.2

  • Migrate file/folder browse fields off the addBrowseFolderListener overload that is scheduled for removal in 2026.2; titles and descriptions are now carried by the FileChooserDescriptor itself.

1.2.1

  • Gutter Run marker no longer recomputes the leaf walk on every PSI element — large Magma files stay responsive.
  • WSL kill path uses ProcessBuilder with discarded stdio so it can’t deadlock on a full pipe buffer, and now briefly polls for the PID file so a very fast Stop doesn’t leak the magma process.
  • Hardened the WSL wrapper script with set -C to block symlink races on /tmp.
  • Sweep stale magma-runner-*.sh wrapper files from %TEMP% on first run after an IDE crash.
  • Early validation for threads, seed and memory limit in both global and per-run settings dialogs.
  • Run-tool-window command line escapes embedded quotes and backslashes correctly.

1.2.0

  • Run-configuration UI redesigned around Magma's actual CLI flags: Threads (-t), Random seed (-S), Startup file (-s, -n), Memory limit (MAGMA_MEMORY_LIMIT, accepts 2G / 512M / …), Extra arguments.
  • -b is now always set internally; the option is gone.
  • Field descriptions moved below their inputs.
  • Reliable Stop in WSL: bypass IJent on the EDT, kill via PID file.

1.1.0

  • Run Magma scripts from the IDE: dedicated run configuration type, gutter Run action, and right-click Run 'script.m'.
  • WSL support on Windows: pick a distribution and the plugin converts host paths and runs magma inside WSL.
  • Global Magma settings under Settings → Tools → Magma (interpreter path, default options, default WSL distribution).

1.0.0

  • Initial release.
  • Syntax highlighting, brace matching, line/block comments.
  • Live templates for the most common Magma constructs.
  • Color settings page.
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for the Magma computer algebra system in IntelliJ-based IDEs.
  • Syntax highlighting for .m, .mag, .magma and .spec files
  • Brace matching and line/block comment support
  • Live templates for common Magma constructs (function, procedure, intrinsic, …)
  • Run configurations for Magma scripts, with native and WSL execution

Disclaimer: This is an unofficial, community-maintained plugin and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or developed by the Magma Computational Algebra Group at the University of Sydney. Magma is a trademark of its respective owners.

Licensed under the Apache License 2.0.
Portions ported from the vscode-magma Visual Studio Code extension by Erkan Tairi (MIT-licensed).
